creator: Alexander88207@protonmail.com
text:
Hello,

after i have installed something, i always empty the cache but now it says that there is nothing to do even though all the packages are in /var/cache/pkg.

Using FreeBSD 12.1-RELEASE-p5 amd64 with the latest repository's.

-------------------
sudo pkg -d clean
DBG(1)[6751]> pkg initialized
Nothing to do.
-------------------
